methodology.baseline: 30 calendar days before event date, end-exclusive
methodology.primaryWindow: event date through two calendar days after, start-inclusive/end-exclusive
methodology.contextWindow: event date through seven calendar days after, start-inclusive/end-exclusive
methodology.robustnessWindow: one and two calendar days after event date, start-inclusive/end-exclusive
methodology.postTimeWindows: per-post exact windows from tweet timestamp through +48h and +72h, with exact 30d pre-post baseline
